(res, path, stat) => {
  expect(res.filename).type.toBe<string>()
  expect(res.statusCode).type.toBe<number>()
  expect(res.getHeader('X-Test')).type.toBe<ReturnType<FastifyReply['getHeader']>>()
  res.setHeader('X-Test', 'string')

  expect(path).type.toBe<string>()

  expect(stat).type.toBe<Stats>()
}

(req, reply) => {
  expect(req.urlData().path).type.toBe<string | undefined>()
  expect(req.urlData().host).type.toBe<string | undefined>()
  expect(req.urlData().port).type.toBe<string | number | undefined>()
  expect(req.urlData().query).type.toBe<string | undefined>()

  expect(req.urlData('path')).type.toBe<string | undefined>()
  expect(req.urlData('port')).type.toBe<string | number | undefined>()

  reply.send({ msg: 'ok' })
}
